channel.title: Security Blog on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security Blog on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: What’s new, updated, or recently released in Microsoft Security
item.description:
Microsoft Security published a brief In the Loop roundup page highlighting recently released, updated, or new security items. The provided content does not include any specific product changes or feature details.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: The threat to critical infrastructure has changed. Has your readiness?
item.description:
Microsoft says critical infrastructure threat patterns are changing and highlights five facts CI leaders should act on in 2026 based on current Microsoft Threat Intelligence observations across sectors. The post is a short security blog entry pointing readers to the full analysis.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
